content: STEP 1+3: UI — изучить фронтенд, найти deal page + sidebar
STEP 1: BreakdownTable + TotalsBlock + Generate Final Costs + Preview modal + Locked badge
STEP 3: PaymentsTable + AddPayment + Confirm/Void + paid/remaining indicator
STEP 4: Auto-status badge на deal + UI feedback (всё связано через recompute_deal_payment_status)
Frontend testing via screenshot + regression backend (124 assertions all green)
